

# **<u>About Me</u>** 

  
<center>
# Hello, I'm [Jovany Cota](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jovany-cota-87aa61178/).
</center>
  
I am an aspiring GIS analyst/technician from Los Angeles, CA, with a Bachelor’s degree in Geography, specializing in geographic information science (GIS), from the University of California, Santa Barbara (Class of 2022). I am passionate about leveraging my experience in GIS to drive innovative solutions and contribute to projects.

Currently, I am employed as a Data Quality Assurance lead for TEKsystems, where I am a contractor for Apple. I have held this position since December 2024 and I am currently in the process of applying to graduate school so I can obtain my masters degree in GIScience. Although my current position is unrelated to GIS, I have learned valuable team/project management skills, as well as experience working with large sets of data.

This website is a collection of GIS projects I have completed. For security and privacy reasons, I am unable to share professional projects I have been involved in the past in previous positions. 

### **<u>Contact</u>**
  - Email: cotajovany03@gmail.com
  - Phone: (323) 901-0442
  
  
![](img/IMG_1191.JPG)
